hero.title: Hello, I'm Vinícius
hero.subtitle:
I'm a senior software engineer with 6+ years of experience leading the development of high-performance web and mobile applications. Strong in JavaScript, React, and TypeScript across the full stack—from frontend (React Native, SolidJS) to backend (Go, Node.js).

I excel at building complex features such as interactive dashboards and real-time chat systems. I mentor teams and manage end-to-end app store deployment. Motivated problem-solver, comfortable in fast-paced environments.

items.title: Path Trader
items.description: Premium full-stack SaaS for traders: journaling, performance analytics, risk context, subscriptions (Asaas), partner program with admin workflows, AI assist, PWA, and a TypeScript monorepo with multiple Next.js surfaces and a NestJS API.

items.title: Rick and Morty Explorer
items.description: An animated series explorer following the adventures of a super scientist and his grandson, featuring complex character relationships and intergalactic discoveries.

items.title: Vestra Financial Management
items.description: A comprehensive financial management platform offering expense tracking, recurring transactions, AI assistance, and dashboard analytics to help users achieve financial goals.

jobs.description: As a full-stack engineer on Path Trader, I designed and built a TypeScript monorepo product for traders to journal trades, review performance, manage risk, and run a partner program, with a strong focus on polished UX and reliable integrations. I owned both the Next.js client applications and the NestJS API—from data modeling with Prisma through payments, file storage, realtime notifications, and production-oriented tooling.
achievements: Architected a pnpm and Turborepo monorepo with a shared Prisma schema, internal UI packages (Radix-style primitives, Recharts), and multiple Next.js surfaces (main app, marketing site, admin, landing).
Delivered the trading journal (accounts, trades, tags, strategies, emotions) plus imports from common broker and export formats; built analytics and path-rank style performance views.
Implemented Lexical-based journal and documents with folders and document types; integrated Asaas billing and a partner program with an admin app for approvals.
Shipped an AI assistant (OpenAI) with usage-aware behavior; authentication with NextAuth.js on Next apps and JWT plus Passport on the API.
Connected Pusher notifications, AWS SES email, and S3 presigned uploads; NestJS backend with validation, throttling, schedules, and BullMQ on Redis.
Delivered a PWA with Serwist; observability with Sentry across Next.js and Node.
Implemented Jest, React Testing Library, and Playwright quality gates; GitHub Actions CI/CD with path-filtered deploys for API, web, site, admin, and landing.
Operational automation: scheduled database backups to S3 and a daily develop → main sync workflow with pull requests and checks before merge.

jobs.description: As a frontend engineer at Bird, I work closely with designers to deliver user-friendly, accessible interfaces and have expanded into backend development with Go. On the sales development team, I delivered features for lead, opportunity, and account management.
achievements: Work with designers to deliver accessible, user-friendly interfaces; expanded into backend work with Go on the sales development team (lead, opportunity, and account management).
Built a custom dashboard where users pick metrics and compose charts, used across the product.
Delivered a cross-app dashboard (charts, tables, KPIs) with Malloy, SolidJS, and Vega.
Implemented analytics UIs with TanStack Table, Recharts, Chart.js, and Radix UI.
Led the marketing cloud redesign with Radix UI and Tailwind CSS.
Established testing with Vitest, React Testing Library, and Cypress.
Maintained and extended API endpoints; shipped features and fixes for performance and stability.

jobs.description: As a senior software engineer at MULTTI, I took on a leadership role—guiding teammates and keeping development processes smooth—and stayed hands-on with backend work in PHP.
achievements: Led teammates and development flow; hands-on backend with PHP where needed.
Built a chat system with WebSockets and a virtualized list (React, PusherJS, Sass).
Delivered a streaming product for the Brazilian financial market (React, Sass, cookies, Reactstrap).
Shipped a delivery-tracking mobile app with push notifications, maps, and custom UI (React Native).
Built a lead management system end-to-end (React, MUI, Sass).
Improved releases with Docker, AWS, and Bitbucket Pipelines.
Owned deployment to Google Play and the App Store.

jobs.description: As a software engineer at Solution4apps, I led and guided both mobile and web work, staying at the forefront of projects and shaping the development flow end to end.
achievements: Led mobile and web delivery across projects, from discovery through release.
Built a React Native app with map discovery, real-time camera flows, push notifications, Maps, and NativeWind.
Delivered an accessible public-sector site with Next.js and Tailwind.
Built an interactive financial markets product with real-time updates (Next.js, Chakra UI, Socket.io, React Spring, Tailwind).
Managed deployment to Google Play and the App Store.

education.title: Specialization: Next.js, React, React Native, TypeScript

contact.title: Let's build something together
